```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Create Helm chart for application packaging"
---
# Helm Chart
## Task
Create a Helm chart for application packaging.
## Requirements
1. Define values.yaml with configurable parameters. 2. Template Deployment, Service, ConfigMap.
3. Support multiple environments via values overrides. 4. Include NOTES.txt for post-install info.
5. Add tests for chart validation.
## Constraints
- Follow Helm best practices. Use named templates. Support upgrade and rollback.
## Success Criteria
- Chart installs cleanly. Values customizable. Multiple environments supported. Tests pass.
```
